pipeline_component: Participant-level split and clean internal protocol
paper_influence: P5 confounding critique; P2 Coswara metadata/bias analysis
why_used: Avoid same-participant leakage and make internal estimates less inflated.

paper_influence: P4 COUGHVID quality labels; P11 deployment-noise concerns
why_used: Remove corrupt/short/mostly-silence recordings and report quality effects.

paper_influence: P10 acoustic features; P13/P16 feature-engineering evidence
why_used: MFCC/delta/mel/chroma/spectral contrast/tonnetz/low-level descriptors provide interpretable, reproducible features.

paper_influence: P9 OpenSMILE speech; P10/P16 feature selection; ComParE/IS10 paralinguistic practice
why_used: Add a strong, standardized handcrafted paralinguistic feature bank before final validation.

paper_influence: P10 RFECV, P16/P17 feature ranking logic, P18 SFS
why_used: Reduce 10k+ merged features to 500/800/1200 selected descriptors without copying one paper pipeline.

pipeline_component: Model bank: logistic, RF/ExtraTrees, SVM-RBF, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, SMOTE variants
paper_influence: P10 BO/SMOTE/TM; P9 RF/SVM; broad COVID audio ML literature
why_used: Test strong classical learners over high-dimensional acoustic features with training-only class balancing.

pipeline_component: Threshold chosen on validation balanced accuracy
paper_influence: P10 threshold moving; clinical imbalance concerns from P5/P6
why_used: Separate threshold selection from test scoring and avoid default 0.5 under imbalance.

pipeline_component: Multimodal fusion: uniform mean, validation-weighted, stacked logistic
paper_influence: P2 Coswara multimodal sounds; P7 cough/breath; P13 cough/breath/speech
why_used: Evaluate whether cough, breath, and speech complement each other.

pipeline_component: Temporal validation and month causal audit
paper_influence: P1 drift-adaptive framework; P5 target-setting recommendations
why_used: Measure whether internal performance survives chronological shift and whether month is a shortcut.

paper_influence: P5 confounding critique; P2 subgroup/bias analysis; P8 confounder discussion
why_used: Quantify how much label predictability exists without audio and how controlled weighting changes audio metrics.

paper_influence: P6 confidence calibration; P10 future calibration work
why_used: Report whether probabilities remain meaningful under external prevalence shift.

paper_influence: P4 COUGHVID dataset; P10 cross-dataset motivation; P11 external validation gap
why_used: Test whether Coswara-trained models transfer to a public external cough dataset.
